Quality Education.reason: Focus on academic ethics and scientific writing aligns with Target 4.7 ('knowledge for sustainable development').

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course trains neuroscience researchers, whose work supports Target 3.4 (mental health) and 3.b (R&D for diseases). The competency 'care for life phenomena' reinforces this.

Quality Education.reason: As a graduate course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and teaches relevant professional skills ('scientific writing') for employment in research and academia (Target 4.4).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops skills for high-value employment in R&D, indirectly supporting technological upgrading and innovation (Target 8.2) and productive employment (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course is fundamental to training R&D personnel, directly supporting Target 9.5 by enhancing scientific research capabilities and encouraging innovation through effective communication.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Directly addresses Target 16.6 (accountable institutions) and 16.5 (reducing corruption) through dedicated lectures on 'Scientific ethics, integrity and misconduct' and 'Responsible conduct of research'.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: A core competency is to 'Enhance the potential for interdisciplinary research cooperation,' which supports the knowledge-sharing partnerships described in Target 17.16.
